assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 9-12 show: '1. **Checkout the target (feature) branch:** git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' followed by '2. **Create the task branch from the feature branch:** git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 20 also states: 'The task branch TC-9205 is based on the feature branch TC-9005, NOT on main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 69-73 state: 'The PR targets the feature branch TC-9005, NOT main:' and show the command 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" --body "..."'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 17 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' for creating the task branch. Line 20 explicitly states: 'The task branch TC-9205 is based on the feature branch TC-9005, NOT on main.' The task branch (TC-9205) is clearly distinct from the target/feature branch (TC-9005).

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: Multiple references to inspecting existing code: plan.md line 27 references 'Follows the existing migration pattern in migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs'. plan.md line 40 states 'Confirm that entity/src/advisory.rs does not reference the status column'. file-1-description.md line 9 references 'following the pattern established in migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs'. file-2-description.md describes modifications to migration/src/lib.rs referencing the existing m0001_initial entry pattern. conventions.md explicitly documents conventions discovered from 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' and 'entity/src/' analysis.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 65 states: 'The commit will include the `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"` flag.'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 52-63 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' as the subject line (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat' and scope 'migration'), and the footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 20 states: 'The Target Branch field in the task description explicitly specifies TC-9005.' Line 69 reiterates: 'The PR targets the feature branch TC-9005, NOT main'. The plan consistently identifies TC-9005 as the target branch throughout.
